name: Tools
author: Erik Hänel
description: This package provides basic procedures via the "tools" namespace, which will enhance and simplify the workflow in many cases. This package also provides multiple sub-namespaces containing functionalities for special cases.
changelog:
2025-03-28 v1.0.8:
  c Changed code to cope with new v1.1.7.2504
  + Modernized some solutions to speed up calculation
2023-01-17 v1.0.7:
  + Added missing procedure $tools~getLatestVersion()
  + Added missing procedure $tools~strings~createColumns()
2022-12-30 v1.0.6:
  + Added keywords
  + Added changeslog
